command.toggle.title: Python CodeLens Lite: Toggle CodeLens
command.refresh.title: Python CodeLens Lite: Refresh Lenses
config.title: Python CodeLens Lite
config.enable.description: Enable or disable all CodeLens features provided by this extension.
config.files.includeInitPy.description: Include __init__.py files when showing CodeLens and counting references.
config.targets.methods.description: Show CodeLens for methods (functions inside classes).
config.targets.moduleVariables.descripti: Show CodeLens for top-level variables and constants.
config.targets.imports.project.descripti: Show CodeLens for imported modules that reside within the current workspace.
config.targets.imports.venv.description: Show CodeLens for modules imported from virtual environments (site-packages/dist-packages).
config.targets.imports.stdlib.descriptio: Show CodeLens for standard library imports.
config.targets.imports.global.descriptio: Show CodeLens for imports that cannot be securely classified into project, venv, or stdlib.
config.references.filterImports.descript: Exclude occurrences located inside 'import' or 'from' statements from the total count and result view.
config.references.filterDefinitions.desc: Exclude the underlying definition's location from the reference count.
config.references.filterSelf.description: Exclude references located inside the definition's own scope.
config.references.minCount.description: Hide the lens if the count (after filtering) is less than this value.
config.references.showZero.description: If false, lenses corresponding to exactly zero references will be hidden.
config.lenses.showImplementations.descri: Show an additional 'N implementations' lens specifically for Python classes.
config.clickAction.description: Behavior when clicking the CodeLens. 'peek' opens an inline peek view; 'reveal' jumps to a matching reference in the editor.
config.performance.debounceMs.descriptio: Delay in milliseconds to wait before updating CodeLenses after typing.
config.performance.maxFileSizeKB.descrip: Skip emitting CodeLens in Python files exceeding this size (in KB). Use 0 to disable the size guard.
config.exclude.description: Glob patterns indicating files where CodeLens should skip calculation.
